title: indulgent mediterranean shirataki pasta
description: this dish combines the unique texture of shirataki noodles with the rich flavors of the mediterranean, perfect for a indulgent evening meal
instructions: heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat
add the sliced onions and cook until translucent
add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute
add the cooked shirataki noodles and stir to combine
add the chopped kalamata olives, artichoke hearts, and sun-dried tomatoes
stir in the chopped fresh parsley and basil
season with salt and pepper to taste
serve immediately, garnished with shaved bonito and lemon wedges
optional: sprinkle with crumbled feta cheese for added indulgence
